prompt: Another element: when we define the second layer of information, such as what is the level of exposure we are using, this should not be at the bottom; this should be the second or third line at the top, similarly again to this model.

assertions.name: formatted_prompt_present
assertions.description: Output contains a fenced code block with a structured/formatted prompt before any execution content

assertions.name: two_phase_visible
assertions.description: There is a clear visual separation between the formatted prompt display and the execution phase

assertions.name: depth_calibration
assertions.description: Depth is correctly calibrated to Light (this is a straightforward formatting/code change request)

assertions.name: task_executed
assertions.description: After showing the formatted prompt, Claude proceeds to address the actual task (describing the esttab/prehead changes)
